headline: Most Retirees Skip Over Vanguard’s $100 Billion VYM Despite Its 2.9 Percent Yield and Almost Zero Maintenance
summary: A retiree holding $200,000 of Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF (NYSEARCA:VYM) collects roughly $5,800 in annual income at the fund’s 2.9% distribution yield, with no rebalancing and no concentration risk to monitor. That is the quiet pitch behind VYM, a roughly $100 billion fund that retirees routinely skip in favor of louder, higher-yielding products on ... summary: Transparency notification byJP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. headline: How The Phreesia (PHR) Narrative Is Shifting With Slower Ad Growth And Tougher Competition
summary: Phreesia’s central fair value estimate has been trimmed from about US$16.17 to US$15.39, a reduction of roughly 4.8% that reflects a more cautious stance on the stock. This reset is consistent with recent analyst commentary pointing to slower digital advertising trends, tougher competition, and a wave of price target cuts and rating changes across the street. headline: How The Palomar Holdings (PLMR) Investment Story Is Shifting After Recent Analyst Revisions
summary: Palomar Holdings is in focus after a trim to its modeled fair value, with the price target moving from US$160.67 to US$155.33, a reduction of about 3.3% per share.
